## Checklist

- [ ] Template compiles with Tectonic (or pdflatex/xelatex)
- [ ] Files follow the folder structure in the README
- [ ] Optional: preview.png thumbnail added (300×400 recommended)
- [ ] registry.json entry prepared (or included in PR)
